raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A dishwasher rack contains various dishes. A green mug is located in the lower right section, surrounded by other mugs and glasses. The mug is rigid with a handle. STRATEGY - Reach the green mug, grasp its handle for a secure grip, lift it, and transport it to a destination (e.g., a countertop or sink). Failure modes include dropping the mug or misgrasping it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the mug body; Step 2 grasp the handle for stable lifting; Step 3 lift and transport; Step 4 place at destination.**
Goal: on(green_mug, surface); stable(green_mug)
Scene: green_mug, dishwasher_rack, surface
Step 1: reach(green_mug)
  affordance_region: the body of the green mug
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_mug, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_mug) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_mug)
  affordance_region: the handle of the green mug
  contact: holding(green_mug) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_mug)
Step 3: transport(green_mug -> surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the surface
  spatial: above(green_mug, surface, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_mug)
  done_when: above(green_mug, surface, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_mug -> surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the surface
  contact: surface_contact(green_mug, surface) [completion]; released(green_mug) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_mug) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_mug, surface) AND released(green_mug)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green mug
the handle of the green mug
an empty area on the surface
an empty area on the surface
